meta.title: Irwin Stelzer on the Lack of Economic Growth in the U.S.
meta.description: Hudson Senior Fellow and Director of Economic Policy Studies Irwin Stelzer discusses the lack of economic growth in the United States. How has federal legislation slowed growth in the country?
